title: lotus corniculatus subsp. komarovii
intro: Lotus corniculatus subsp. komarovii, also known as the Lotus or Bird's Foot Trefoil, is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family and is a subspecies of the Lotus corniculatus. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lotus corniculatus subsp. komarovii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to treat various health conditions.
